subject: Remove or modify species
body:
Hi everyone, 
I have tried warp these days to process my data, but I have made a mistake 
when I import a species with the wrong parameters. I want to modify the 
species parameters or just delete the species to import it again, but I 
don't know how to do it. 
Thanks! 
Sincerely, 
Yangyang

SingleParticle LLC
